query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(CAST(amount_usd AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_usd, SUM(CASE WHEN order_id IS NOT NULL AND order_id != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_clob_id FROM orders WHERE created_at >= '2026-03-13 10:51:00' GROUP BY status
